mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sy_menu WHERE MENU_PARENT_NO = #{menuParentNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO
SELECT * FROM sy_menu WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY DEPTH, ORDERNO
SELECT * FROM sy_menu WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY DEPTH, ORDERNO
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sy_menu m INNER JOIN sy_role_relation rr ON m.MENU_NO = rr.MENU_NO WHERE m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ROLE_NO = #{roleNo} ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sy_menu m INNER JOIN sy_role_relation rr ON m.MENU_NO = rr.MENU_NO INNER JOIN sy_role_group_relation rgr ON rr.ROLE_NO = rgr.ROLE_NO INNER JOIN sy_user_relation ur ON rgr.ROLE_GROUP_NO = ur.ROLE_GROUP_NO WHERE m.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND rgr.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.ACTIVITY = 1 AND ur.USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM sy_menu WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo} AND ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT m.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO, pvi.CONTENT AS PARENT_MENU_NAME FROM SY_MENU m LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON m.MENU_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON m.MENU_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON m.MENU_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON m.MENU_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME pvi ON m.MENU_PARENT_NO = pvi.NO AND pvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' WHERE 1=1
AND ( m.MENU_CODE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gen.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gzh.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gko.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY m.DEPTH, m.ORDERNO
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_MENU SET MENU_PARENT_NO = #{menuParentNo}, MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}, MENU_IMG = #{menuImg}, DEPTH = #{depth}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo}
mapper.delete: UPDATE SY_MENU SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE MENU_NO = #{menuNo}
